title: /ex
text: /ex Requests an exclusive Uniface Server from the Uniface Router. Explain this code [PATHS] $SRV : NetworkConnectionString /ex Copy Description By default, the Uniface Router starts shared servers. Use the /ex switch to specify that the Uniface Router should create an exclusive connection from the client to the Uniface Server. For example, the following path definition requests an exclusive server on path $asv : [PATHS] $asv = tcp:servermachine+13001|user|password|myasv /ex Copy Depending on the UST definition in the [SERVERS] section of the Uniface Router's assignment file, the Uniface Router will accept or reject the request. For more information, see [SERVERS] . Related Links /shr Used in a client assignment file path to request a shared server from the Uniface Router. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
